channel.title: Create FortiGate VMs :: SE How-To Build Lab
channel.description: If you get the error No route to host with any of the following steps, use the Troubleshoot Ansible steps Copy Bootstrap ISO’s, Create VM’s, Start VM’s from Terminal in OOB ​ RDP to OOB cd /home/fortinet/automation/ansible/fortinet Copy bootstrap ISO’s to Proxmox server ​ RDP to OOB ./copy_fgt_bootstrap_iso.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> Create the FGT VM’s on Proxmox ​ RDP to OOB ./create-vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> fortigate_sdwan v7.6.6.M Start the VM’s just created ​ RDP to OOB ./start_remove_vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> fortigate_sdwan started List FortiFlex Config IDs List the Config IDs for each configuration created in the Ansible Prerequisites step Create VM Configuraion ​ Continuing from Terminal in OOB cd /home/fortinet/automation/ansible/fortiflex ​ Continuing from Terminal in OOB ./flex-configs-list.sh ​ Example Output
